abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Tangled Threads
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, every enemy model within 1" of this model or one friendly Wicked Doll in LoS gains a Staggered token.

actions.name: Needle and Thread
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "1" or (magic)8". When targeting a model with a Staggered token, this action receives a (magic).

triggers.name: Can't Breathe
triggers.text: Remove a Staggered token from the target. When resolving, this action deals +2 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Leftover Stuffing
triggers.text: Make an enemy Remains marker in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Careful Assembly
actions.effects: Summon a Wicked Doll in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target.

actions.name: Healing Energy
actions.effects: Target heals 2. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +2.
